message:
feat(installer-update): wire offline bundle preflight, metadata cache policy, and broad E2E coverage

This commit lands the main installer/update orchestration upgrades for bd-2j5.20 and bd-2j5.9, plus supporting tests and CLI wiring.

Installer and artifact contract integration:

- Extend install flow with run_install_sequence_with_bundle and a preflight stage that validates bundle manifest compatibility for the current host target before proceeding.

- Enforce offline bundle integrity verification in install preflight by resolving host artifact entries and validating SHA-256 supply-chain checks through the shared verification path.

- Add bundle manifest version enforcement in src/cli/mod.rs (manifest version must be 1) with explicit SBH-1001 style configuration errors for unsupported versions.

Update command/cache/offline enhancements:

- Expand UpdateOptions with metadata cache path + TTL, refresh-cache control, notices toggle, and optional offline bundle manifest input.

- Add cached target metadata resolution with deterministic source attribution (pinned/cache/network/offline-bundle), including cache write-through on network fetch and cache bypass when refresh is requested.

- Add offline update mode that resolves artifacts from bundle manifests, validates pin/tag consistency, loads archive/checksum from local bundle paths, and keeps JSON report semantics consistent with online mode.

- Make user-facing follow-up notices conditional on notices_enabled to respect configuration-driven opt-out behavior.

CLI/config plumbing:

- Add install and update --offline flags and update --refresh-cache flag in src/cli_app.rs.

- Centralize update option construction from loaded Config values (cache file, cache TTL, notices policy) via build_update_options.

- Keep env-driven update opt-out handling in config coherent while preserving deterministic parsing behavior.

Test and harness coverage:

- Add tests/common run_cli_case_with_env support for deterministic environment injection in integration scenarios.

- Add integration tests covering fresh-cache offline success and stale-cache offline failure behavior for update checks.

- Add a comprehensive installer_e2e matrix (new tests/installer_e2e.rs) spanning install/reinstall/uninstall, bundle preflight success/failure paths, rollback/prune lifecycle, wizard/bootstrap behavior, contract resolution checks, from-source prerequisite flows, and golden output expectations.

- Strengthen from-source tests in src/cli/from_source.rs for script probe fallback/error behavior and improve path/extension assertions.
